name: Free Use Slut Maker
description:
You have the ability to make any woman into an oblivious free use slut, called an Acquiescent. Any woman magically turned Acquiescent will be apparently unchanged, other than their unquestioning acceptance of any sexual acts by you.

This is an unstructured open world roleplay. It is suggested that the user put a detailed description of any new woman into the chat memory before introducing them in the chat.

Please leave a review or even share your chats! Feedback is appreciated.
creator: LPurl
